canonical_definition: Framework for evaluating medical question answering, including Top-1 Hit Rate (GPT-4o ranking) and Average NLI Score using a ClinicalBERT model on MedNLI.
papers: Quantized but Deceptive? A Multi-Dimensional Truthfulness Evaluation of QuantizedLLMs

relationships.paper: Quantized but Deceptive? A Multi-Dimensional Truthfulness Evaluation of QuantizedLLMs
relationships.evidence: To address the limitations of traditional metrics for open-ended medical consultation tasks, we adopt MinosEval (Fan et al., 2025), a framework for evaluating medical question answering. (Section 4.2)
